summary: Outputs the previous frame's result of a downstream TOP, enabling recursive visual feedback loops for trails, echoes, and iterative effects.

key_params.name: top
key_params.note: Path to the target TOP whose previous-frame output is fed back

key_params.name: resetpulse
key_params.note: Pulse to clear the feedback buffer to black

key_params.name: resetcondition
key_params.note: When to auto-reset: None, On First Frame, On Parameter Change

common_gotchas: The Target TOP parameter must point to a TOP *downstream* of this node; pointing upstream creates no loop.
Feedback runs one frame behind — combine with a Composite or Level TOP to decay or the image will saturate.
